title: Linux Rare Process Detection (Stacking)
description: Identifies rarely-seen processes on Linux endpoints. Uses the rare value hunting technique (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Sorting/Stacking method) to surface processes that appear fewer than 100 times across the active search window, which keeps the demo resilient for a 14-day dataset and repeated reingestion while still surfacing uncommon tooling.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and 'Process Name' != '' | stats count as executions by 'Process Name' | sort executions | head 25
